  - metric: task-completion-rate
related_features: [task-creation]

## Why

Team leads want visibility into whether tasks are actually getting done, not
just created. This feature targets the same completion-rate metric as task
creation itself, from the reporting side rather than the authoring side.

## Scope

- Read-only dashboard, one chart: completion rate over time
